nasb.text: If anyone thinks he is a prophet or spiritual, let him recognize that the things which I write to you are the Lord’s commandment.

esv.text: If anyone thinks that he is a prophet, or spiritual, he should acknowledge that the things I am writing to you are a command of the Lord.

cnv.text: 如果有人自以為是先知或是屬靈的，他就應該知道我寫給你們的是主的命令；

ccb.text: 如果你们当中有人自认为是先知或属灵的人，他就应该知道我现在所写的是主的命令。

csbs.text: 如果有人自以为是做先知传道的，或是属灵的，就应该承认：我写给你们的是主的命令；
